TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kent_Bazemore, title = Kent_Bazemore, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kent_Bazemore} }

S.FORM: Kent Bazemore hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1989, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 7, Kent Bazemore, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Kent Bazemore hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1989, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 7, Kent Bazemore, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: kent βazemore ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw / praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, kent βazemore, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
